parameters.query: SELECT s.*, array_agg(DISTINCT rs.related_slug) as related_spokes FROM sn_spokes s LEFT JOIN sn_related_spokes rs ON s.slug = rs.spoke_slug WHERE s.slug = '{{ $json.slug }}' GROUP BY s.id, s.slug, s.name, s.description, s.official_description, s.personal_tip, s.ai_description, s.icon, s.plugin_id, s.category, s.credential_type, s.min_version, s.setup_steps, s.actions, s.common_errors, s.code_example, s.tags, s.created_at LIMIT 1;

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": false, "error": "Database connection failed. Please try again." }
={ "success": false, "error": "AI model unavailable. Please try again shortly." }
={ "success": false, "error": "Failed to generate spoke details. Please try again." }

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sn_spokes (slug, name, description, official_description, personal_tip, ai_description, icon, plugin_id, category, credential_type, min_version, setup_steps, actions, common_errors, code_example, tags, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.spoke.slug }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.name }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.description ? $json.spoke.description.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.official_description ? $json.spoke.official_description.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.personal_tip ? $json.spoke.personal_tip.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.ai_description ? $json.spoke.ai_description.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.icon || "🔌" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.plugin_id || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.category || "Integration" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.credential_type || "OAuth 2.0" }}',
  '{{ $json.spoke.min_version || "Rome" }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.spoke.setup_steps || []) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.spoke.actions || []) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.spoke.common_errors || []) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($json.spoke.code_example || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.spoke.tags || []).map(t => "'" + t + "'").join(",") }}],
  NOW()
) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET
  ai_description = EXCLUDED.ai_description,
  updated_at = NOW();
